personas.name: Frustrated Conversational User
personas.description: A user who expects natural, intelligent conversations from the chatbot but becomes frustrated when responses are repetitive or fail to understand their input.
pain_points: Chatbot does not understand user input
context: Using the chatbot for emotional support or guidance
Expecting chatbot to behave like a real listener
constraints: Responses must feel dynamic and non repetitive
Chatbot must correctly interpret user intent

personas.name: Cost Conscious User
personas.description: A user who is interested in the app's mental health support but is frustrated by paywalls, limited free features, and in your face monetization.
goals: Access useful mental health tools for free or low cost
Explore the app before committing financially
pain_points: Limited access to key features without payment
context: Trying the app for the first time
Comparing with other mental health apps
constraints: Core functionality should be available without payment
Pricing should feel fair and transparent

personas.name: Mental Health Support User
personas.description: A user dealing with anxiety, stress, or depression who uses the app as a supportive tool to manage emotions and improve mental well being.
context: Using the app during moments of stress or anxiety
constraints: Support must be reliable and accessible anytime
Advice should feel empathetic and relevant

personas.name: Self Improvement User
personas.description: A user who values structured mental health techniques and thought reframing to improve their mindset and emotional strength.
goals: Learn and apply mental health techniques
pain_points: Difficulty maintaining consistent self improvement habits
Need for guided and structured exercises
constraints: Techniques must be easy to follow
Guidance should be structured and actionable

personas.name: Private Yet Expressive User
personas.description: A user who values the app as a safe, private, and non judgmental space to openly express thoughts and emotions.
goals: Have a private outlet for emotions
pain_points: Fear of judgment in real life conversations
Lack of safe spaces to express emotions
context: Using the app as an emotional outlet
Reflecting on personal thoughts and feelings
Engaging in private conversations with the chatbot
constraints: The app must feel safe and non judgmental
Privacy and confidentiality must be maintained
